cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out the order of the birds on the branch. We have five birds: owl, hummingbird, crow, hawk, and robin. The problem gives us some clues about their positions. Let me go through each clue one by one and see if I can piece together the order. First, the hawk is to the right of the owl. So wherever the owl is, the hawk has to be somewhere to its right. Then the hummingbird is to the right of the hawk. So the order so far is owl, then hawk, then hummingbird. So that's three birds in order: owl -> hawk -> hummingbird. Next, the crow is the second from the right. Since there are five birds, the positions from left to right can be labeled as 1, 2, 3, 4, 5.
